heading_outline.rendered_as_rotating_sentence: Supercharge {Insurance|Finance|Healthcare|Manufacturing} with AI.\nExperience the future of work.

page_anatomy_top_to_bottom: 1. Fixed top nav (transparent on hero scroll, white below) — left logo, center menu, right 'Try now' filled CTA
2. Hero (dark plum #3C043B canvas) — rotating-industry H1, muted gray subhead, primary 'Try demo' + secondary 'Contact us' inline arrows
3. H2 'High-performance AI built by experts' — model lineup band (Solar Pro 3 / Pro 2 / Mini / Syn Pro)
4. H2 'Transforming high-stakes industries' — 4-industry grid (Insurance / Healthcare / Manufacturing / Financial Services) on a dark canvas, large industry word card-fronts
5. H2 'Trusted by leading companies worldwide' — customer logo strip + customer-story cards
6. H2 'Flexible deployment, enterprise-ready anywhere' — deployment matrix (API / On-premise / Marketplace)
7. H2 'Proven excellence in AI' — research/benchmark proof band
8. Footer (dark #191722) — 5-column site map + newsletter row + KR business-information legal block

primary_cta_variants: 'Learn more →' — repeated inline link across every product/solution card (18px / weight 500, surface-color text + arrow glyph)
'Developer Console' / 'Learn more' — .button.is-secondary white pill with violet text, 8px radius, weight 500
interactive_inventory.card_pattern: Product cards inherit border-radius 8px, transparent background, paragraph body in #70757F gray. No drop shadow.
interactive_inventory.industry_card_pattern: Each high-stakes industry presents a giant industry word as its own H1 sibling — typography-as-imagery.

layout_observations: 1280px desktop sweet spot; max-full-width token is 100vw with section-internal max-content rails
Hero left-aligned (not centered) — text starts ~10% from left, no centered headline composition
Generous vertical whitespace between bands (~64-96px estimated) — not measured live
Heavy reliance on **surface-color shift** between sections (plum → white → dark) for visual rhythm; almost no decorative gradients, illustrations, or drop-shadow cards

brand_resource_center.kind: asset distribution (logo PNGs / symbol PNGs across light & dark variants), NOT a token specification page
brand_resource_center.rights_statement: All rights to the brand assets, including intellectual property rights, are owned by Upstage Co., Ltd.
